json_data.title: Preparation for the Major
json_data.description: Select one series in elementary Greek, and one course in intermediate Greek:
courses: CLASSIC 10 - Discovering Greeks
CLASSIC 20 - Discovering Romans

options.title: Elementary Greek
options.description: Greek 16 may be substituted for Greek 1, 2, 3.

options.title: Intermediate Greek
courses: GREEK 20 - Intermediate Greek I

json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Complete seven upper-division Greek courses, including course 110.

options.title: Upper-Division Greek Courses
options.description: Greek 197 and 199 may be applied only by petition.
courses: GREEK 110 - Study of Greek Prose

GREEK 199 - Directed Research in Greek
